projects.title: Advanced Login Page + Registration Form
projects.description: A secure authentication system with form validation, password requirements (min 6 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 number), remember me functionality, and Google login demo.

projects.title: IT Lab - Scripted Assistant & Quiz
projects.description: An interactive IT learning tool featuring a Scripted Assistant with 3 IT questions (CPU, RAM, HTML) and a 30-second timed quiz with 5 questions.

projects.title: The Brave Little Seed - Interactive Story
projects.description: An engaging children's story webpage with collapsible story sections, navigation buttons, and a comprehension quiz with instant feedback.

projects.title: My Enhanstatic Page
projects.description: An enhanced interactive page featuring personal background information, major subjects, hobbies, and fun facts about friends with smooth animations.

projects.title: Contact Form with Validation
projects.description: A fully functional contact form with real-time validation for name, email, subject, and message fields with dynamic success feedback.

projects.title: Responsive Educational Portfolio
projects.description: A complete portfolio website showcasing academic work, technical skills, and interactive features with fully responsive design.
